name: @relai-fi/shielded-link-demo
description: Two Claude-driven agents negotiate a private USDC payment over a RelAI shielded link on solana-devnet. Each agent loads its own Claude Skill (.claude/skills/relai-shielded-{send,receive}) at startup and operates against the live RelAI Management API + Solana network. No simulation, no plugin coupling — standalone.
